_label_note: EU Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered public support-hotline bait, obfuscated VAT/tax/passport phone-shaped fragments, dotted-date and filing-reference phone bait, role/placeholder emails, template passport values, EU registry/ISIN/LEI/tax numeric fragments, log-id amount fragments, placeholder country-code phones, and negated MAE/contingent-MNPI language. Full EU member-state national-ID breadth and broader semantic GDPR special-category coverage remain ideal-tier gaps.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: HR data to remain on EU servers only
A V A L - 0 0 - X X - 0 0 0 0
insider list entry code I N S - S B - 0 7
Proposed acquisition of a 27.5% stake in HelioGrid S.A
Proposed acquisition of a 27.5% stake in HelioGrid S.A. for ~€240,000,000 cash; valuation metrics and break fee are not disclosed externally and remain MNPI under MAR.

Status: definitive Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) targeted for execution on 2026-06-30; conditions precedent include merger control clearances in Unionia and Seravia, employee information/consultation, and no withdrawal of key transmission licences.

CSRD/SFDR: initial double-materiality mapping complete; expected Taxonomy-aligned revenues of 42% post-closing; PAI indicators and transition plan will be included in the next sustainability statement (issuer-level).

Research/IR draft (not public): internal model shows ~12% synergy uplift not in current guidance; mid-single-digit EPS accretion expected in year two; draft Q&A prepared for investors, hold until embargo expiry.
